posts.author: Rahul_Behera
posts.community: Rajesh Exports: Time to examine this story seriously?
posts.text: CNBCTV18 – 26 Jun 26 Rajesh Exports says ED search ends with no discrepancies in inventory or cash... Rajesh Exports said the Enforcement Directorate concluded a search at the company's premises on June 25, with no discrepancies found in inventory or cash and no valuable items seized.
